top_signals.title: China’s gold market cools amid ETF outflows: report
top_signals.summary: Chinese gold exchange-traded funds recorded their first monthly outflows since August 2025.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Shipping Industry Leaders Condemn Recent Attacks on Seafarers
top_signals.summary: BIMCO, the International Chamber of Shipping (ICS), INTERCARGO and INTERTANKO unanimously condemns recent attacks on seafarers and commercial shipping in and around the Strait of Hormuz. According to the International Maritime Organization (IMO)…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Knicks Win Triggered Record Loss for Susquehanna Sports Traders
top_signals.summary: Jeff Yass, the founder of the Wall Street trading firm Susquehanna International Group, has long been a New York Knicks fan. But he couldn’t fully savor the moment when the team completed its epic comeback to win game four of the NBA finals.
